# Project Instructions

- This workspace is an Expo React Native app written in TypeScript.
- Keep the architecture modular and split code across `src/components`, `src/screens`, `src/navigation`, `src/store`, `src/slices`, `src/hooks`, and `src/types`.
- Use React Navigation for screen flow and Redux Toolkit for shared state.
- Prefer small reusable components and placeholder data until screenshot-based UI work is requested.
- Keep code strongly typed and avoid introducing unnecessary dependencies or abstractions.
- Use relative imports unless the project is explicitly reconfigured for path aliases.
- Update `README.md` when the setup or available scripts change.
